description: Yggdrasil address derivation test vector. Seed all-0x01 derives Ed25519 pubkey via Schnorr keypair, then ygg_addr = 0x02 || SHA-512(pubkey)[0:7] || IID where IID = SHA-256(pubkey)[0:8] with U/L bit cleared. Matches Rust yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey, C lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519, and Python yggdrasil_address.
Zero pubkey vector verifying U/L bit clear in IID and Yggdrasil prefix. Matches all three oracles and spec/04-network.md.
Known Ed25519 pubkey vector. Verified cross-oracle between Rust, Python, and C implementations.
